summary: Closed, unmerged extern-only slice of a larger matching-improvement branch, scoped to Dolphin THP decoder code. The actual code change in `extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c` refactored `__THPDecompressiMCURowNxN` to use a local `THPFileInfo* info` consistently, replaced a raw offset-derived `THPCoeff** mcuBuffer = (THPCoeff**)((u8*)info + 0x10)` with repeated casts through `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView`, and routed component/quant-table access through `info`. The PR was superseded by combined Dolphin support split PR #2632 because the extern-only split triggered an EditorConfig workflow edge case where all changed files were filtered out.

key_files.reason: Only changed file; contains the `__THPDecompressiMCURowNxN` matching-oriented cleanup.

what_changed: In `__THPDecompressiMCURowNxN`, direct references to global `__THPInfo` were replaced in several places with the existing local `THPFileInfo* info` variable, such as `info->xPixelSize`, `info->components[...]`, and `info->quantTabs[...]`.
Removed the local raw pointer alias `THPCoeff** mcuBuffer = (THPCoeff**)((u8*) info + 0x10);`.
Replaced `mcuBuffer[n]` uses with `((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[n]` when passing MCU buffers to Huffman decode and inverse DCT helpers.
Kept existing overlay-style casts for other field groups, including `THPMCURowFields` for `MCUsPerRow` and `THPRestartFields` for restart/currMCU handling.
The PR body says this was split from #2617 by directory/subsystem to make matching improvements easier to review, but the PR was later closed as superseded by #2632.
smart_moves: Using the local `info` variable consistently reduces repeated global loads from `__THPInfo`, a common decomp matching tactic when the compiler likely reused a local pointer.

Replacing the magic offset cast `((u8*) info + 0x10)` with a named overlay/view type, `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView`, makes the layout intent searchable and less error-prone while preserving the underlying memory interpretation.
The slice was constrained to `extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp`, which was intended to make a broad matching-improvement branch easier to review by subsystem.
The PR documentation included local checks and an unsplit-branch matching report, giving reviewers context about expected matching impact and regression status.
decomp_lessons: When a file uses multiple overlay structs for the same backing object, prefer named view structs over anonymous byte-offset casts if they preserve matching; this makes hidden layout assumptions clearer.

For THP decoder work, `THPFileInfo` may need to be viewed through specialized structs such as `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView`, `THPMCURowFields`, and `THPRestartFields` to expose fields at known offsets without forcing one monolithic struct definition.
Replacing global accesses with a local alias can be important for matching, especially inside tight decoder loops where the original compiler likely kept the pointer in a register.
Directory-only PR slicing can run into CI/workflow filtering edge cases; in this case, an extern-only split was superseded because the EditorConfig workflow filtered out all changed files.
The evidence does not show final per-slice matching numbers for this exact PR; only the broader unsplit branch report was provided.
naming_conventions: `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView` names a layout view around the MCU buffer area rather than using raw pointer arithmetic.
`THPMCURowFields` and `THPRestartFields` follow the same pattern of suffixing a layout-overlay struct by the logical field group it exposes.
Existing Dolphin/THP internal function names use double-underscore prefixes, e.g. `__THPDecompressiMCURowNxN`, `__THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY`, `__THPInverseDCTNoYPos`, and `__THPInverseDCTY8`.
Global THP decoder state names retain existing mixed-case conventions such as `__THPInfo`, `__THPLCWork672`, `Gbase`, `Gwid`, and `Gq`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use a local `THPFileInfo* info` pointer instead of repeatedly loading `__THPInfo` when matching compiler register allocation and load patterns.

Express offset-based struct access through a named casted view, e.g. `((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[n]`, rather than holding a separate derived pointer if that better matches generated code.
Preserve overlay casts for fields that are not represented directly in the base `THPFileInfo` type, such as `((THPMCURowFields*) info)->MCUsPerRow` and `((THPRestartFields*) info)->RST`.
Avoid assuming a single complete struct layout when the matching code benefits from multiple partial views over the same memory.

review_feedback.feedback: PR was superseded by combined Dolphin support split PR #2632.
review_feedback.implication: Future references should likely inspect #2632 for the merged or authoritative version of this extern/Dolphin support work.

review_feedback.feedback: The extern-only split hit an EditorConfig workflow edge case where all changed files were filtered out.
review_feedback.implication: When splitting PRs by path, check workflow path filters; too-narrow extern-only slices may fail or be unactionable in CI.

review_feedback.feedback: No review comments or formal reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
review_feedback.implication: There is no evidence of reviewer-requested symbol names or style corrections for this PR.

follow_up_queries: Inspect PR #2632 for the combined Dolphin support split that superseded this extern-only PR.
Compare `THPFileInfoMCUBufferView` usage across THP decoder functions to see whether the overlay-view naming pattern was adopted consistently.
Check whether the `__THPDecompressiMCURowNxN` changes from this slice landed through a later merged PR.
Review CI path filters for extern-only PRs that may be excluded by EditorConfig workflows.
